name: Top competitors
description: All Claims USA (Boca Raton), Continental PA (Coral Springs, 42yr), Stellar PA (Hollywood), Pinnacle (Pompano), People's Choice (Lake Worth)

name: All Claims USA
description: A+ BBB, FAPIA member, Xactimate services listed as differentiator, 4 offices, extensive city landing pages, FL + 3 states

name: Continental PA
description: NAPIA + FAPIA dual membership, 23+ state licenses, media appearances (Mike Rump), hurricane-specific landing pages per storm

name: Competitor gaps
description: No competitor offers interactive claim tools, very few produce video content, almost none have full bilingual websites

name: CRA gaps vs competitors
description: No FAPIA/NAPIA membership, no blog, no city landing pages, ~6 Google reviews vs 40-200+, not on Yelp/Thumbtack/HomeAdvisor

title: Differentiation strategy
rationale: Interactive tools, full bilingual Spanish site, client portal, video testimonials — none of these done by any competitor
